details.marketingDescription:
Discover an exceptional investment opportunity with Cowbird Campground RV development located at 3771 72nd Street, Live Oak, FL 32060.​

Boasting high-visibility frontage on Interstate 75, this 106± pull-through campsite property is perfectly positioned for maximum exposure and convenience.​

Each 7,000± SF campsite offers full hookups (water, sewer, power & wifi) ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay for travelers.​ Plus, with room to expand and customize, you have the flexibility to add premium amenities such as a clubhouse, pool, walking trails, dog park, or other resort-style features to enhance the guest experience.​

With seamless highway access, a spacious layout, and endless development potential, this is a high-potential investment in one of Florida’s most traveled corridors.​ Don’t miss this chance to create a top-tier RV destination!

details.marketingDescription:
The property at 20303 Old Somerset Acres Lane is a 13-unit, fully park-owned mobile home park located in the fast-growing Spring Hill, FL market.​ This asset offers stable, reliable cash flow along with substantial value-add potential, making it an appealing opportunity for both experienced investors and those entering the mobile home park space.​ Owning all 13 units allows for enhanced operational control and maximized income consistency.​

An appraisal report is available upon request, and the property is being offered below the appraised value, providing immediate built-in equity.​ Since the appraisal, ownership has completed significant renovations and upgrades across multiple units, further improving overall quality, rental upside, and long-term asset value.​

Presenting a rare investment opportunity in Tallahassee, FL—this 13-unit mobile home park, situated on 4.96± acres along Pinestraw Trail, offers immediate cash flow and strong upside potential.​ All mobile homes are park-owned, providing maximum control over the property and rental terms.​ With a consistent history of full occupancy and an excellent leasing track record, the community is stabilized and income-producing from day one.​

Currently operating with below-market rents, this asset presents a compelling value-add opportunity for investors to increase revenue through strategic rent adjustments and operational improvements.​ The expansive acreage also allows for potential future enhancements or expansion (subject to zoning and approvals).​

details.marketingDescription: Fully renovated, specialty commercial equestrian facility offering strong in-place income with significant upside.​ Cash-flowing equestrian farm off Southern Blvd, set on 5 elevated acres in the heart of Loxahatchee Groves, just minutes from Wellington.​ The property offers 53 stalls across two updated barns, 16 fenced pastures, two riding arenas, a round pen, three RV spots, and generous trailer parking.​ On-site housing includes a 3-bed, 2-bath cabin and two mobile homes.​ Current operations deliver a ~7.7% in-place cap at the asking price, with a clear path to mid-to-high teens stabilized returns through lease-up and full utilization of existing assets.​ Short hack to new equestrian riding trails.​ Ride your golf cart to shopping and restaurants.​ Zoned and fully licensed as a rental operation, the farm supports boarding, training, leasing, and additional equestrian uses.​ Numbers are based on current “dry stall” rentals, increase revenues by offering full board.​ A rare, turn-key opportunity with strong income, operational flexibility, and close proximity to riding trails, shopping, and world-class horse venues.​
details.name: The Cash Cow Farm of "Wellington North"

details.marketingDescription:
American Property Group of Sarasota, Inc.​ presents Three Adjacent Residential Parcels on Southpointe Dr, Sarasota, FL

Total Lot Size: 38,301 SF (Three parcels totaling 12,767 SF each)

Rare opportunity to acquire three adjacent residential parcels located on Southpointe Dr in Sarasota, just minutes from the world-famous Siesta Key beaches.​ This unique assemblage includes a duplex, a single-family home, and a vacant lot; offering flexibility for personal use, investment income, or future redevelopment.​ You can build your dream home with water views easily with a huge yard, easy access to many established local businesses, schools, grocery stores and more, all just a few minutes from Siesta Key Beach!

1.​ Duplex – 1,993 SF
1860 Southpointe Dr, Sarasota, FL
This well-maintained two-family dwelling features two spacious 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom units, making it ideal for investors or multi-generational living.​ The property includes a rare RV full hookup pad, a two-car garage, and access to a community boat dock, enhancing its versatility and rental appeal.​ Its location and features make it a prime opportunity for those seeking strong income potential in Sarasota’s hot residential market.​

2.​ Single-Family Home – 1,852 SF
1848 Southpointe Dr, Sarasota, FL
Charming and versatile, this 2 bedroom, 4 bathroom home offers generous interior space and unique potential for customization or expansion.​  The home features a private screened-in in-ground pool; perfect for relaxing or entertaining in the Florida sunshine.​ With access to the same community boat dock as the neighboring parcels, it serves as an ideal primary residence, vacation home, or rental property.​

3.​ Vacant Residential Lot – 12,767 SF
0 Southpointe Dr, Sarasota, FL
Ready for development or held for future investment, this buildable lot shares RSF-1 zoning and offers direct adjacency to the existing homes; perfect for a custom home, guest house, or expansion of your portfolio.​

Each property is available individually or all three can be purchased together as a package.​
details.name: Residential Assemblage Near Siesta Key

locations.fullAddress: 9215 SW 190th Avenue Rd, Dunnellon, Marion County, FL 34432

description: Turnkey 22-Unit Bungalow Community Steps From the Rainbow River, Near Numerous Outdoor Destinations
name: Rainbow River Bungalows

details.investmentHighlights:
• ​Turnkey Vacation Rental Community: Rainbow River Bungalows is a fully operational, redeveloped vacation rental community with 22 modern tiny homes, all built in 2019 or newer. The property is efficiently managed, offering a smooth, turnkey operation for investors.
  • ​Prime Location with Deeded Access: Situated in Dunnellon, Florida, just steps from the Rainbow River and KP Hole County Park, with free deeded access to the river for water sports like kayaking, paddleboarding, and snorkeling. The Gulf of Mexico is only 20 miles away, providing additional appeal for tourists.
  • ​Strong Revenue Streams: The property generates consistent revenue from short-term rentals, lot rents, and value-added services including equipment rentals, food trucks, and resort fees.
  • ​Positioned for Growth: With opportunities to expand offerings such as food trucks, live entertainment, and branded merchandise—along with the potential to build a single-family home for additional rental income or resale value—the property is primed for significant revenue growth.
  • ​Convenient Access: Located just 1.5 hours from both Tampa and Orlando Airports, offering easy access for tourists and travelers.
details.marketingDescription:
Rainbow River Bungalows is a turnkey vacation rental community located in Dunnellon, Florida, offering 22 modern tiny homes with deeded access to the scenic Rainbow River and KP Hole County Park.​ Since its opening in 2021, the property has seen impressive financial growth, doubling its Net Operating Income (NOI) each year.​ Revenue is generated through short-term rentals, lot rents, and value-added services such as equipment rentals, food trucks, and resort fees.​

With its prime location, just 20 miles from the Gulf of Mexico and 1.5 hours from both Tampa and Orlando Airports, Rainbow River Bungalows attracts visitors seeking outdoor recreation.​ The property operates smoothly and is well-positioned for future growth, with opportunities to expand amenities like food trucks, live entertainment, and branded merchandise.​ This investment offers both immediate returns and long-term potential in a high-demand market.​
details.name: Rainbow River Bungalows
details.description: Turnkey 22-Unit Bungalow Community Steps From the Rainbow River, Near Numerous Outdoor Destinations

details.marketingDescription: Two manufactured housing development projects in fast-growing Marion County, just minutes from The Villages, offered together for $2.495M  80 planned double-wide homesites on 15.77 acres across Belleview and Summerfield, FL  At pro forma $700 lot rent and a 5.5% cap, a stabilized 80-pad portfolio here supports an estimated value of ~$8MBelleview project: 31 pads at 11987 S US Hwy 301, Belleview, FL 34420 - PMH-zoned, fully entitled, shovel-ready with signed permits, public water/sewer, Duke Energy, strong US-301 frontage, plus an existing ~1,500 sq ft home ideal for future clubhouse/sales office.​  Summerfield project: 49 pads at 9345 SE 140th Pl, Summerfield, FL 34491 - 10 acre cleared site with public utilities, PMH-zoned  and concept plan approved, near US-441 and The Villages  Ground-up development with upside beyond a typical stabilized community; sites are ~10 minutes apart for shared crews, staging, home orders, and management to reduce per-pad construction and operating costs, with a natural phased strategy to stabilize Belleview first and, potentially refinance it to help fund infrastructure and home rollout at Summerfield  Flexible exit: land-lease, home sales, and/or rentals  Contact listing agent for the full OM; access by appointment only-do not disturb sites or neighbors.​
details.name: 9345 SE 140th Place

details.marketingDescription:
This unique approximately 5-acre multi-building property presents an unparalleled income-generating opportunity in one of Florida’s fastest-growing markets! Featuring four well-maintained buildings, including 3000 sq.​ ft.​ 4 bedroom, 2 Bath home plus 14-lot RV park.​ This property offers multiple revenue streams and huge upside potential.​ Located just off State Road 54, it provides easy access to major highways, Downtown Zephyrhills, Wesley Chapel, and Tampa, making it an ideal long-term investment

Property Overview:

14-Lot RV Park on 3 Acres mol :

Full hook-ups with 50 amp electric, county water, and septic system

Generous 40' x 65' lots to accommodate large RVs, utility sheds, and parking

High and Dry location with strong potential for expansion or redevelopment

Currently undervalued rental rates, offering immediate upside for new ownership

Includes Two Chariot Park Model Homes:

Each features concrete drive with attached carport, washer/dryer utility room, plus room addition.​

Comfortable, long-term rental units with high occupancy potential

Concrete Block Clubhouse & Office Space:

Includes a dedicated private office for park management

Two full bathrooms with showers for tenant convenience

Large covered front awning, ideal for community gatherings

Concrete Block Home on 2 Acres mol :

3000 sf 4-bedroom, 2-bath home with an additional office or 5th bedroom

Spacious 20' x 40' game room

Metal detached garage with large carport and extra storage buildings and carports

Fully fenced for security and privacy, security alarm, generator transfer panel, and 3 bay dog kennel

Fully fenced and primed for RV park expansion, storage units, or future development

Provides additional flexibility for the property’s highest and best use

Investment Highlights & Growth Potential:

Located Near State Road 54: Provides easy access to Tampa, Wesley Chapel, and major commercial hubs.​

Surging Real Estate Growth: Zephyrhills is a high-growth area with increasing demand for housing, RV accommodations, and commercial developments.​

Expanding RV Market: Florida’s RV park industry is booming, with a projected value of $658.6M by 2025and increasing traveler demand for long-term stays.​

Multiple Uses & Expansion Options:

Convert additional land into storage units, a mobile home park, or an event venue

Expand the RV park with additional full-service lots

Develop rental cabins or glamping sites to attract higher-income tenants

Not in a Flood Zone: No risk of flooding, reducing insurance costs and investment risks.​

Well-Maintained Infrastructure: No damage from recent hurricanes, ensuring a turnkey investment with minimal initial upgrades required.​

Additional Possible Uses:

· Glamping or Tiny Home Community – Capitalize on the short-term rental boom

· Office Space or Business Park – Perfect for small businesses, co-working, or professional offices

· Assisted Living or Senior Housing – Zephyrhills is a top retirement destination!

· Event Venue or Retreat Center – Weddings, corporate retreats, festivals, and more

· Truck/RV/Boat Storage or Flex Space – High demand for vehicle storage in this area

· Short-Term Vacation Rentals – Convert buildings into Airbnbs or seasonal rentals

Zephyrhills is experiencing rapid development, driven by:

-Major infrastructure projects improving roads and access to Tampa and Orlando

-Increased tourism and long-term RV living trends, making RV parks a high-demand asset

-New residential and commercial developments, bringing more businesses and long-term residents to the area

-Expansion of healthcare and retail amenities, further driving population growth

***Please Do not disturb the tenants.​***Do not walk the property without to Don’t miss this chance to invest in one of Florida’s fastest-growing markets.​ Contact us today for financials, zoning details, and a private tour!
